channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Nvidia's new world model helps robots navigate the world
item.description: Nvidia unveiled Cosmos 3, an open AI world model designed to help robots, autonomous vehicles and other physical systems better understand and predict their environment.

item.title: Graham Platner tests Democrats' tolerance for scandal
item.description: Donald Trump shattered long-held political norms when Republicans elected him twice despite scandals that would have sunk most candidates. Maine Senat...

item.title: AI ignores religion when you need it most and takes sides when you ask about switching
item.description: Data: Consortium for Evaluating Faith and Ethics in AI; Chart: Russell Contreras/Axios Artificial intelligence models are quietly shaping spiritual ad...

item.title: The Rattled Generation: A unified theory of this American moment
item.description: After years of talking to hundreds of CEOs, elected officials, social scientists and ordinary Americans, this is our best take on how things stand in ...
